title: Election Campaigns Intensify Across Karur
summary: Political parties have stepped up campaign activities across Karur district with rallies, public meetings, and voter outreach programs. Leaders are focusing on local issues to gain voter support ahead of the elections.

title: Karur Emerges as Key Electoral Battleground
summary: Karur has become a significant electoral battleground as major parties compete aggressively to secure votes, deploying senior leaders and resources across the district.

title: Residents Demand Better Road Conditions
summary: Residents in Karur have raised concerns about poor road conditions and are urging authorities to carry out repairs and improve infrastructure for safer commuting.

title: Textile Industry Sees Growth in Karur
summary: Karur’s textile industry continues to grow with increased domestic and export demand, strengthening its position as a major textile hub in Tamil Nadu.

title: Heatwave Advisory Issued in Karur
summary: Authorities have issued a heatwave advisory as temperatures rise across Karur, advising residents to take precautions and avoid outdoor exposure during peak hours.
